title: Secure Password Manager
description: Built a secure, offline desktop password manager as part of a collaborative group project. Encrypts all stored credentials using AES-256, secures access with a master password and TOTP MFA, and includes password generation, strength analysis, reuse detection, and age-based security alerts.

title: Keylogger
description: A tool for educational purposes that logs keystrokes and takes screenshots, demonstrating both software-based and hardware-based keylogging techniques.

title: Network Scanner
description: A command-line tool for network administrators and security professionals to scan and analyze network hosts using ICMP echo requests, TCP port scanning, and ARP scanning.

title: Vulnerability Scanner
description: A lightweight Python vulnerability scanner that probes target IPs/URLs for open ports, HTTP security headers, SSL/TLS certificate info, and known CVEs through banner-based lookup.

title: SecurePass - Password Health & Breach Monitoring App
description: A full-stack web app that checks password strength and known data breaches using the HaveIBeenPwned API and zxcvbn library.

title: FoodHub Data Analysis
description: Performed exploratory data analysis for a food delivery company to understand customer demand across restaurants and cuisines, generating actionable business insights.

title: Personal Loan Purchase Prediction
description: Built a machine learning classification model to predict whether liability customers are likely to purchase personal loans, with feature correlation analysis and customer segmentation.

title: Visa Approval Prediction
description: Developed a machine learning classification model to predict visa application outcomes based on applicant and employer attributes, with extensive EDA and model evaluation.

title: Predictive Maintenance for Wind Turbine Failures
description: Built classification models to predict wind turbine generator failures from sensor data, focused on cost-sensitive decision making to minimize false negatives and reduce equipment replacement costs.

title: Medical Question Answering System using RAG
description: Developed a retrieval-augmented generation system for medical Q&A using the Merck Manuals. Built a pipeline to chunk documents, generate embeddings, store in ChromaDB, and retrieve context for grounded LLM responses.

title: Safety Helmet Detection using Computer Vision
description: Developed an image classification system to detect whether workers are wearing safety helmets using CNNs and transfer learning with VGG16, with data augmentation to improve accuracy.

title: File I/O Utility Library (Custom Insert, Delete, Extract)
description: A low-level file manipulation library in C using system calls to insert, delete, and extract bytes from files at arbitrary positions without relying on stdio.
